name: patch_mismatch_loop
user_request: Replay a repeated apply_patch mismatch that must force fresh context.

findings.title: Repeated patch mismatch requires fresh file digest
findings.evidence: The same apply_patch signature failed twice against the same anchor.
findings.impact: Retrying the same patch can loop without observing current file contents.
findings.required_fix: Read the exact target file again and generate a fresh patch from the current digest.

expected_progress_contains: Repeated patch mismatch requires fresh file digest
